title: Spec Approval Record
description: Written to .sc4sap/program/{PROG}/approval.json at the Spec Approval Gate of create-program. Binds the human approval to the exact spec content (SHA-256 of spec.md) and to the target SAP system, so that a spec edit or a system switch after approval invalidates the approval.

spec_sha256.description: SHA-256 (lowercase hex) of spec.md exactly as approved. Phase 4 and Phase 6 recompute and compare; mismatch requires re-approval.

sid.description: SAP system ID the approval applies to (from the active connection profile).

client.description: SAP client the approval applies to.

tier.description: System tier from the connection profile (e.g. sandbox, dev, qa, prd).

transport.description: Transport request the approved work will be recorded on (from Phase 1B dimension 6).

approval_keyword.description: The exact explicit approval keyword the user typed. Only these keywords count as approval.

prog.description: Program name the spec covers (optional convenience field).

approver.description: Identifier of the approving user, when known (optional).
